---
title: "Key Info and Announcements"
date-modified: "today"
format: 
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(here)
source(here("class_dates.R"))
```

## Announcements

- Time tomorrow to grade Quiz 1
- Don't forget the search function on our site!!
- Lab 3 should be posted tomorrow!

## Key Dates

- HW 2 due `{r} hw2 %>% format("%m/%d")`
- Lab 3 due `{r} lab3 %>% format("%m/%d")`
